channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Toronto Developer Abandons High-Rise Project Near Sneaky Dee’s, Avoiding Demolition
item.description: A developer in Toronto has unexpectedly halted a proposed high-rise condominium project that would have required the demolition of the iconic Sneaky Dee’s restaurant. The decision comes after communit...

item.title: Somali Migrants Choose to Stay in South Africa Despite Anti-Immigrant Protests
item.description: The article discusses the decision of Somali migrants to remain in South Africa despite escalating anti-immigrant protests and xenophobic violence. Despite the risks, many Somali migrants prefer to st...

item.title: U.S. Navy Suspends Search for Missing Sailor After Helicopter Crash in Arabian Sea
item.description: The U.S. Navy has officially suspended the active search for a sailor who has been missing since Wednesday following a helicopter crash in the Arabian Sea. The incident involved an MH-60S helicopter t...

item.title: Harry Styles' Emotional Farewell at Wembley Residency with Sister Gemma
item.description: Harry Styles concluded his record-breaking 12-night Wembley Stadium residency with an emotional farewell, joined by his sister Gemma on stage. The singer, 32, appeared visibly moved as Gemma delivered...

item.title: Union Home Minister Amit Shah reviews Manipur security situation, addresses Kuki-Naga conflict and border fencing
item.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah reviewed the security situation in Manipur with senior state officials in Delhi, discussing escalating ethnic violence between Kuki and Naga communities. The meeting, hel...

item.title: Washington Nationals defeat Pirates with five homers and resilient pitching
item.description: The Washington Nationals secured a 9-5 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates in a thrilling game that highlighted both offensive firepower and defensive resilience. With two pitchers facing potential su...

item.title: President Marcos Advocates Direct Participation of VP Duterte in Impeachment Trial
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has urged Vice President Sara Duterte to personally attend her impeachment trial, emphasizing the importance of direct testimony over legal representation. During a medi...

item.title: Avenue Capital Group Advances in Acquiring CapitaLand's Australian Lending Unit
item.description: Avenue Capital Group, a New York-based investment firm, is in advanced discussions to acquire CapitaLand’s corporate lending unit in Australia. This unit, which was purchased by CapitaLand last year a...

item.title: Tanzania's Political Shift: President Samia Strengthens Loyalty Within Ruling Party
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan's consolidation of power within Tanzania's ruling Chama Cha Mapinduzi (CCM) party has intensified as she promotes ultra-loyalists while sidelining moderates. Her 2021 asc...

item.title: Chief Minister Naidu's Visit to Banaganapalle for Farmer Passbook Distribution
item.description: The district administration is meticulously preparing for the scheduled visit of Chief Minister Nara Chandrababu Naidu to Banaganapalle mandal on July 9, where he will distribute Pattadar passbooks to...

item.title: Former Deputy Governor Baba Tela's Two Children Killed in Road Accident
item.description: Former Bauchi State Deputy Governor Baba Tela is in mourning after losing two of his children, Mustapha and Ummi, in a tragic road accident. The siblings died on Saturday while traveling along the Bau...

item.title: Nigerian Tennis Prodigy Qualifies for Wimbledon Junior Championships
item.description: Oluwaseun 'The Shark' Ogunsakin, a Nigerian tennis player, has made history by qualifying for the Wimbledon Grand Slam tournament. This achievement marks the first time Nigeria's flag will be represen...

item.title: The Rise of Amateur Detectives in Modern TV Drama
item.description: The article explores the growing trend of amateur detectives in television dramas, analyzing how fictional portrayals of non-police characters solving crimes have captured public imagination. It contr...

item.title: SAPS dismisses fabricated video claims, details real incident involving security guard
item.description: The South African Police Service (SAPS) in Mpumalanga has confirmed that a viral video falsely alleging an attack on a Namibian truck driver during recent national protests is entirely fabricated. Pol...

item.title: UDSM Student's Computational Research Offers New Hope for Schizophrenia Treatment
item.description: A third-year student at Tanzania’s University of Dar es Salaam, Anthony Tepeli, has pioneered a computer-based research project to identify potential new compounds for treating schizophrenia. His 10-m...

item.title: Alex Eala Makes History with Wimbledon R16 Win at Centre Court
item.description: Philippine tennis sensation Alex Eala etched her name in history by securing a historic victory at Wimbledon's Centre Court in the Round of 16. The win marks a monumental achievement for Filipino spor...

item.title: Two Women and Four Cats: A Memoir of Friendship and Shared Life
item.description: The article reviews the memoir 'Two Women Living Together' by Hwang Sunwoo and Kim Hana, which chronicles their journey of cohabitation as two single women in South Korea. The book explores themes of ...

item.title: TLGU Launches Women's Golf Vision and Lady President Cup
item.description: The Tanzania Ladies Golf Union (TLGU) has launched its 2026/2030 Presidential vision and strategic plan, focusing on transforming women's golf in Tanzania through youth development, education, leaders...

item.title: Modise calls for Hugo Broos' exit as Bafana seeks fresh football strategies
item.description: Former Bafana Bafana midfielder Teko Modise has urged the resignation of coach Hugo Broos, arguing that the national team requires new ideas to compete effectively. Despite Broos' success in elevating...

item.title: Linda Mwananchi Supporter Dies After Brutal Attack in Keumbu
item.description: Vincent Osiemo, a prominent Linda Mwananchi supporter, died following a violent attack by unidentified assailants in Keumbu, Kisii County. The incident occurred during a rally convoy traveling to Kero...
